pageContext.name: Spider-Gwen #1
pageContext.description: Not the worst way for a teenage girl to spend her Friday evening.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Spider-Gwen #1 Fine Art Print, a collectible Marvel Comics art print by fan-favorite cover artist J. Scott Campbell with colors by Nei Ruffino.  It's sunset above the city on Earth-65, home of the one and only Spider-Gwen! Unmasked, Gwen Stacy takes a moment to enjoy the sights while she's not catching thieves in her web. Using her spider-powers to stick to the side of a building, this super hero-slash-drummer stuns in her iconic white, black, and pink suit with teal accents. With great power comes one seriously great view.   Originally created as a JSC Store exclusive cover to Spider-Gwen #1 (2015), written by Jason Latour for Marvel Comics, fans can now bring home this gorgeous Gwen Stacy illustration in a fine art format. Each Spider-Gwen #1 Fine Art Print is hand-signed by J. Scott Campbell and features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 piece. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel artwork is a must-have for fans of the Spider-Verse and Campbell's iconic comic book covers!   Take a break from busting criminals and add the Spider-Gwen #1 Fine Art Print by J. Scott Campbell to your Marvel collection today.
